---
title: "Posit Conf 2025 — Agenda Chat"
subtitle: "A weekend RAG project in R"
format:
  revealjs:
    liveurl:
      button: true
      shortcut: "u"
      position: "right"
      width: "46vw"
      mode: "auto"
      openNewTabFallback: true
      sticky: true
      global:
        - label: "Posit Conf 2025 Chat"
          url: "https://posit-ai-posit-conf-agenda-chat.share.connect.posit.cloud/"
revealjs-plugins:
  - liveurl
---

## About this deck {.smaller}

These slides walk through a Shiny chat app built for the **Posit Conf 2025** agenda.

Press **`u`** to open the live app alongside the slides.

> **Note:** The app is hosted on Posit Connect Cloud. If it doesn't embed,
> use ↗ in the panel header to open it in a new tab.

## About Posit Conf 2025 {.smaller}

**Posit Conf** (formerly rstudio::conf) is the flagship annual event for the
R and Python open-source data science community.

- Hosted by [Posit PBC](https://posit.co) — makers of RStudio, Quarto, Shiny
- Sessions span keynotes, workshops, and lightning talks across two days

The 2025 edition featured sessions on:

- **AI + data science tooling** — LLMs, RAG, vector stores
- **Quarto** — reproducible documents and presentations
- **Shiny** — interactive web apps in R and Python
- **Community** — diversity, open source, collaboration

## The app {.smaller}

Attendees can explore the conference schedule through natural conversation
instead of digging through a static agenda page.

- *"What sessions are about LLMs or AI?"*
- *"Who is speaking about Quarto?"*
- *"What workshops are available on day 1?"*
- *"Give me a summary of the keynotes."*

The assistant retrieves relevant session chunks from a vector store and
generates a grounded answer — it's less likely to hallucinate sessions,
though errors are still possible.

## How it was built {.smaller}

A three-stage **RAG pipeline** built entirely in R over a weekend:

```
Conference website
        ↓  (web scraping with rvest)
  Structured agenda data
        ↓  (ragnar: chunk + embed + store)
  Vector store index
        ↓  (ellmer: retrieval + LLM)
  Shiny chat UI  ←→  User
```

Deployed to **Posit Connect Cloud**.

## Key packages {.smaller}

| Package | Role |
|---------|------|
| [`shinychat`](https://posit-dev.github.io/shinychat/) | Streaming chat UI component for Shiny |
| [`ellmer`](https://ellmer.tidyverse.org/) | Unified LLM client (OpenAI, Anthropic, …) |
| [`ragnar`](https://ragnar.tidyverse.org/) | RAG framework: chunking, embedding, retrieval |
| [`rvest`](https://rvest.tidyverse.org/) | Web scraping for the agenda data |

::: {.liveurl}
- [shinychat docs](https://posit-dev.github.io/shinychat/)
- [ellmer docs](https://ellmer.tidyverse.org/)
- [ragnar docs](https://ragnar.tidyverse.org/)
:::
